bannerSubtitleEn: Open positions and opportunities in our group
joinUsZh: 我们诚招优秀的博士后研究人员、研究生和科研助理加入实验室！
joinUsEn: We are seeking talented postdoctoral scholars, graduate students and research assistants to join the lab!
joinUsDetailZh: 热忱欢迎对科学研究感兴趣的博士后、研究生加入本课题组！
joinUsDetailEn: We warmly welcome postdocs and graduate students interested in scientific research to join our group!

positions.descZh: 诚邀具有相关研究背景的优秀博士后加入团队，提供有竞争力的薪酬和完善的科研支持。
positions.descEn: We sincerely invite outstanding postdoctoral fellows with relevant research backgrounds to join our team. Competitive salary and comprehensive research support provided.

positions.descZh: 欢迎对科研有热情的硕士生和博士生报考，全方位的学术训练和发展平台。
positions.descEn: We welcome enthusiastic Master's and PhD students. Comprehensive academic training and development platform provided.

positions.descZh: 招聘科研助理协助课题组日常科研工作，提供良好的研究环境与成长机会。
positions.descEn: Recruiting research assistants to support daily research activities. A supportive research environment and growth opportunities provided.
